headline: Kyndryl, DXC, and Equifax Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over" and threatened fresh strikes, sending oil prices soaring and triggering a broad risk-off move.

headline: Equifax (EFX) Faces A Valuation Test On Its $750 Million Círculo De Crédito Deal
summary: Equifax (EFX) has moved back into the spotlight after agreeing to acquire Mexico’s Círculo de Crédito for an enterprise value of US$750 million, a deal that could reshape its international mix. See our latest analysis for Equifax. Equifax’s share price has picked up in the short term, with a 1-day share price return of 1.54% and a 7-day share price return of 9.99%. Year to date, however, the share price is down 18.43% and the 1-year total shareholder return is down 33.21%. This suggests that...

headline: Equifax Market Pulse Index Report Highlights Growing Pressure on the U.S. Middle Class
summary: Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) today released its first quarter 2026 Market Pulse Index, a measure of U.S. consumer financial health derived from anonymized credit, debt, income, and asset data along with VantageScore insights. The Market Pulse Index dipped from 61.6 to 60.9, marking its second straight quarter of decline, with drops observed across all generations.
